stemHtml: In the event of a dual-channel failure of the Mach trim system in flight, what is the appropriate course of action?

options.a: It is solely up to the Commander to decide if the aircraft may be flown.
options.b: The aircraft may be flown at or below a specified lower altitude.
options.c: The aircraft may be flown at or below a specified lower Mach number.
options.d: The aircraft cannot fly passengers, however it may be flown to a maintenance facility at a lower speed, at or below the changeover altitude.
